name: MafiaIA Skill Packs
hashAlgorithm: sha256 over "<relpath>\0<sha256(file)>\n" lines, files sorted by relative path

packs.name: Marketing online
packs.description: Copywriting, SEO, conversion, pricing and launch strategy for growing a product online.

skills.name: product-marketing

packs.name: Superpowers
packs.description: The well-known Superpowers methodology bundle: brainstorming, planning, TDD, code review and worktree discipline for coding agents.

skills.name: using-superpowers
skills.description: Entry point that teaches an agent when and how to reach for the rest of the Superpowers bundle.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: brainstorming
skills.description: Refines a rough idea through questions, explores alternatives and saves a design document before code is written.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: writing-plans
skills.description: Breaks approved design into bite-sized tasks with exact file paths and verification steps.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: executing-plans
skills.description: Works through a written plan task by task, verifying each step before moving on.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.description: A disciplined loop for isolating and fixing bugs instead of guessing at fixes.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.description: Enforces a strict red-green-refactor loop for new code.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: using-git-worktrees
skills.description: Creates an isolated git worktree workspace for a task and verifies a clean baseline before work starts.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: requesting-code-review
skills.description: Prepares a change and requests a focused code review from another agent.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: receiving-code-review
skills.description: Processes incoming code-review feedback and decides what to act on.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: finishing-a-development-branch
skills.description: Wraps up a development branch cleanly — merges, cleans worktrees and closes the loop.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: verification-before-completion
skills.description: Forces an explicit verification pass before declaring a task done.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: subagent-driven-development
skills.description: Coordinates multiple subagents against a shared plan, each owning a scoped piece of work.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: dispatching-parallel-agents
skills.description: Dispatches independent pieces of work to parallel agents and reconciles their results.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).

skills.name: writing-skills
skills.description: Guides how to author a new, well-scoped SKILL.md — the meta-skill behind the rest of the bundle.
skills.note: Pack: Superpowers. Fuente: obra/superpowers (MIT, 258k★, activo).
